prerequisites: A Paddle account. Sign up for a sandbox account for testing or a live account for production, since sandbox and live use separate accounts and credentials.
A Paddle API key created in the dashboard under Developer Tools > Authentication > API keys. The key is shown only once at creation, so store it securely.
Decide which environment to target. Sandbox keys only work against the sandbox base URL and live keys only work against the live base URL.
A start date from which to begin syncing records (the start_date config field).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Paddle uses API key authentication. Provide the key in the connector's api_key field. Paddle sends it on each request via the Authorization header with the Bearer prefix (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Create the key in the Paddle dashboard under Developer Tools > Authentication on the API keys tab. Keys are environment specific: the prefix is pdl_sdbx_ for sandbox and pdl_live_ for live, and by default a key expires 90 days after creation.

setupSteps.title: Create or sign in to a Paddle account
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Paddle. Use a sandbox account to test the integration or a live account for production data. Sandbox and live are separate environments with separate credentials.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: In the Paddle dashboard go to Developer Tools > Authentication and open the API keys tab, then create a new key. Optionally assign granular permissions to limit which entities and operations the key can access. Copy the key immediately because it is only displayed once. The key begins with pdl_sdbx_apikey_ for sandbox or pdl_live_apikey_ for live.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector credentials and environment
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the api_key field. Set the environment field to match the key: choose sandbox for keys prefixed pdl_sdbx_ (base URL https://sandbox-api.paddle.com) or live/production for keys prefixed pdl_live_ (base URL https://api.paddle.com). A key only works against its matching environment URL.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should sync records.

sources.title: Paddle API reference: getting started / about
Strengthen your integration security with enhanced API keys (Paddle changelog)
